Localization.Description: Detection of attempts to stop an important service. The list of services is in the table list Significant_Services.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt to stop the important service {object.name} is detected on host {event_src.host}. At the service {object.name} changed the startup option to SERVICE_DISABLED (а service that cannot be started)
An attempt to stop the important service {object.name} is detected on host {event_src.host}. At the service {object.name} the registry key responsible for autorun has been deleted

An attempt to stop the important service {object.name} is detected on host {event_src.host}. At the service {object.name} changed the startup option to SERVICE_DEMAND_START (will be loaded at the request of the user or program)
